heading: Limitation on reduction in income tax liability incurred to the Virgin Islands
label: 934 Limitation on reduction in income tax liability incurred to the Virgin Islands

children.heading: General rule
children.label: a General rule
children.text: Tax liability incurred to the Virgin Islands pursuant to this subtitle, as made applicable in the Virgin Islands by the Act entitled “An Act making appropriations for the naval service for the fiscal year ending , and for other purposes”, approved (), or pursuant to section 28(a) of the Revised Organic Act of the Virgin Islands, approved (), shall not be reduced or remitted in any way, directly or indirectly, whether by grant, subsidy, or other similar payment, by any law enacted in the Virgin Islands, except to the extent provided in subsection (b).June 30, 1922July 12, 1921July 22, 195448 U.S.C. 139748 U.S.C. 1642

children.heading: Reductions permitted with respect to certain income
children.label: b Reductions permitted with respect to certain income

children.heading: In general
children.label: 1 In general
children.text: Except as provided in paragraph (2), subsection (a) shall not apply with respect to so much of the tax liability referred to in subsection (a) as is attributable to income derived from sources within the Virgin Islands or income effectively connected with the conduct of a trade or business within the Virgin Islands.

children.heading: Exception for liability paid by citizens or residents of the United States
children.label: 2 Exception for liability paid by citizens or residents of the United States
children.text: Paragraph (1) shall not apply to any liability payable to the Virgin Islands under section 932(b).

children.heading: Special rule for non-United States income of certain foreign corporations
children.label: 3 Special rule for non-United States income of certain foreign corporations

children.heading: In general
children.label: A In general
children.text: In the case of a qualified foreign corporation, subsection (a) shall not apply with respect to so much of the tax liability referred to in subsection (a) as is attributable to income which is derived from sources outside the United States and which is not effectively connected with the conduct of a trade or business within the United States.

children.label: i
children.text: the total voting power of the stock of such corporation, and

children.label: ii
children.text: the total value of the stock of such corporation, is owned or treated as owned (within the meaning of section 958) by 1 or more United States persons.

children.heading: Determination of income source, etc.
children.label: 4 Determination of income source, etc.
children.text: The determination as to whether income is derived from sources within the United States or is effectively connected with the conduct of a trade or business within the United States shall be made under regulations prescribed by the Secretary.
